fact: In clinical/biological contexts, second brain can refer to the enteric nervous system in the gut.
product_relevance: This means product naming should clarify that the platform is a medical-memory concept, not gut-brain biology.
research_topic: Shared Health Memory: a medical second-brain approach for unresolved health issues

fact: Popular second-brain systems focus on capturing, organizing, distilling, and using knowledge later.
product_relevance: Healthcare needs a modified model because medical memory must handle safety, uncertainty, responsibility, and review.

product_relevance: A health platform should support patient-clinician-team memory, not just individual patient storage.
